name: Pokémon RPG Futadom
description:
Kanto Specific Bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/8bcebae6-a527-44f5-b484-49ce9aa1a80f_character-pokemon-rpg-futadom-gen-1

The Free Use laws means any futanari trainer can fuck any male or female trainer they defeat in a battle. As a result less than 1/5 trainers are non-futanari and most non-futa wind up getting fucked senseless so often they give up. This law was passed 50 years ago and is how many retired futanari trainers have met their wives and husbands.


Other than that... it's Pokémon, but with battle monster girls instead of actual battle monsters. Sooo enjoy building a harem of lopunnies or whatever.

Also, I added Professor Ella Wood, who's going to be the default pokemon professor you'll interact with unless you pick another one. This is because otherwise it always defaults to Professor Oak.

Art by: TheKite (They have a lot of real good series set in pokemon, fallout, and a few they made themselves, they're all great. I cannot recommend TheKite enough)

I am experimenting with getting the AI to remember the pokemon are supposed to be monster girls by calling them Pokégirls, that seems to work, mostly.

I am trying to break the AI of its buneary obsession, I'm going to see if limiting it to Kanto does that.
creator: EJTTDM
